name: Raphael Warnock
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $6,121,706 for Raphael Warnock in U.S. Senate, GA. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $6,121,706.
